content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Demo credentials exist (demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt) but notes.txt just says "n/a", with no instructions on how to reach the subscription paywall or core app-blocking/schedule/report features behind it.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit steps to unlock gated functionality, especially when a paywall sits between login and core features (PaywallView.swift) — credentials alone aren't enough if the reviewer doesn't know to subscribe or how to bypass/simulate that in review. Replace "n/a" with actual steps, e.g. "Sign in with provided credentials, then use sandbox account to subscribe via the $4.99/month paywall to access blocking/schedules/reports."
